hero.max_rank_skill_tips_translated: Active Elevation: Upgrades Gash to Ultra-Gash
hero.max_rank_skill_desc_translated: *Ultra-Gash: Reduce DEF-related by 12%. When damage taken reaches 20% of Max HP, take Truth damage equal to 320% of the attacker's ATK and reset the damage counter

skills.name: tid#SkillName_1173_p1
skills.desc_short_translated: At the beginning of the battle, let yourself and our character with the lowest maximum health gain the #Entry_1# effect. At the end of our turn, let 1 our characters without the #Entry_1# effect gain the #Entry_1# effect. When our character attacks, if it has the #Entry_1# effect, it will cause extra damage of #Entry_1# record value 100% to the target.
skills.max_desc_short_translated: At the beginning of the battle, let yourself and our character with the lowest maximum health gain the #Entry_1# effect. At the end of our turn, let 1 our characters without the #Entry_1# effect gain the #Entry_1# effect. When our character attacks, if it has the #Entry_1# effect, it will cause extra damage of #Entry_1# record value 100% to the target.
skills.entry_desc_translated: *Grudge: When taking damage, absorb 30% of the damage taken and store the absorbed value as Grudge stacks. The stored value cannot exceed 100% of the bearer's base Max HP
skills.r_max_entry_desc_translated: *Grudge: When taking damage, absorb 30% of the damage taken and store the absorbed value as Grudge stacks. The stored value cannot exceed 100% of the bearer's base Max HP

skills.name: tid#SkillName_1173_p2
skills.desc_short_translated: When our character with the #Entry_1# effect takes action, he will obtain 1 #Entry_2# effects, which can be superimposed 4 times, and the character will recover his maximum health 8%. This effect is not affected by the recovery rate.
skills.max_desc_short_translated: When our character with the #Entry_1# effect takes action, he will obtain 1 #Entry_2# effects, which can be superimposed 4 times, and the character will recover his maximum health 8%. This effect is not affected by the recovery rate.

skills.name: tid#SkillName_1173_p3
skills.desc_short_translated: Increase all ability values of our characters by 18%, and increase your own attack-related abilities and damage by 12%. When your health drops below 70%, 50%, and 30% for the first time, you will immediately release your 1, 2, and 3 active skills. When your #Entry_1# effect reaches 4 When this happens, it will immediately cause damage to all enemies with an attack power of 190% and #Entry_2#
skills.max_desc_short_translated: Increase all ability values of our characters by 18%, and increase your own attack-related abilities and damage by 12%. When your health drops below 70%, 50%, and 30% for the first time, you will immediately release your 1, 2, and 3 active skills. When your #Entry_1# effect reaches 4 When this happens, it will immediately cause damage to all enemies with an attack power of 190% and #Entry_2#

skills.name: tid#SkillName_burst_1
skills.desc_short_translated: Gaining Power Burst increases self's basic stats by 10% for 1 turn.
skills.max_desc_short_translated: Gaining Power Burst increases self's basic stats by 10% for 1 turn.

skills.name: tid#SkillName_1173_p2
skills.desc_short_translated: When our character with the #Entry_1# effect takes action, he will obtain 1 #Entry_2# effects, which can be superimposed 4 times, causing the character to recover his maximum health value 8%. This effect is not affected by the recovery rate. If the character has the effect of being unable to restore life, the character will obtain 1 a shield of the maximum health value 15% within the round.
skills.max_desc_short_translated: When our character with the #Entry_1# effect takes action, he will obtain 1 #Entry_2# effects, which can be superimposed 4 times, causing the character to recover his maximum health value 8%. This effect is not affected by the recovery rate. If the character has the effect of being unable to restore life, the character will obtain 1 a shield of the maximum health value 15% within the round.
